shared_attributes.movement: right to left scrolling at Current_Speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump
context.screen_position: spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Most common obstacle, appears from game start, requires basic jump to avoid

visual_specification.shape: Single vertical desert cactus with spiky protrusions
visual_specification.details: Vertical cactus shape with 2-4 spiky arms extending from main trunk, clear silhouette for easy recognition

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style as cactus_medium and cactus_large
relationships.differences_from: cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti grouped), cactus_large is 102x100px (3 cacti grouped, taller)

explicit_negations: no animation or movement beyond scrolling
